ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the passenger survived */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd class) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "family_cnt" INTEGER /* Number of family members aboard */,
  "cabin_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the passenger had a cabin */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss., Dr.) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "travel_companions" TEXT /* Names or IDs of travel companions */,
  "life_boat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_family_cnt FOREIGN KEY ("family_cnt") REFERENCES family_groups ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival statistic */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the statistic is for survivors */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in the statistic */,
  "class_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of passenger classes */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of genders */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ages */,
  "embarked_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of embarkation ports */,
  "nationality_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of nationalities */,
  "occupation_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of occupations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers that can be accommodated in the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of amenities available in the class */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_groups" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family group */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "survival_count" INTEGER /* Number of family members who survived */,
  "head_of_family" TEXT /* Name of the head of the family */,
  "family_members" TEXT /* Names or IDs of family members */,
  "family_occupation" TEXT /* Primary occupation of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck_level" INTEGER /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., Single, Double, Suite) */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  "cabin_location" TEXT /* Location of the cabin (e.g., forward, aft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_prices" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare price */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket class */,
  "fare_price" REAL /* Price of the fare */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for fare */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the fare */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_prices_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the group */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger for whom the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_survival" INTEGER /* Predicted survival outcome */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., Logistic Regression, Decision Tree) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Survival Analysis, Fare Analysis) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., Bar Chart, Line Chart) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Bug Report, Feature Request) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., New, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
